seoTitle: Nangwee vs Nankin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nangwee and Nankin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nangwee and Nankin.
heading: Nangwee vs Nankin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nangwee, Queensland and Nankin, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nankin has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Nangwee (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nangwee or Nankin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nangwee has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Nankin scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nangwee scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Nankin scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nangwee or Nankin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nankin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
